issues.detail: Missing coverage of error handling and edge cases in instructions.
Instructions lack concrete runnable code or step-by-step procedures.

scenarios.name: GROQ projection with reference dereferencing
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses projection on each block, the -> dereference operator for joined data, and sets useCdn:true with a pinned apiVersion date; baseline fetches whole documents and omits useCdn.

scenarios.name: Live preview with click-to-edit overlays
scenarios.rationale: Treatment wires up @sanity/visual-editing, client.listen() for real-time updates, and draft filtering with !(_id in path("drafts.**")); baseline only enables draftMode + VisualEditing without listen() or draft filtering.
